body:
🔓 VIP — your SKRUSDT short delivered. TP1 tagged, closed in the green. 👇

🔻 SKRUSDT — SHORT (Bitunix · 15m)
ID: SKR-S-20260627
Entry zone 0.00865–0.00872 → TP1 0.00840 ✅

You had this call first, live. The triangle broke down on cue: rejected under descending resistance, lost rising support, rolled into TP1 — a clean ≈3% on the short before leverage.

SL was at 0.00895, set before entry — the loss was capped before the win was ever on the table. That's the discipline that lets us run size on the fast frames.

15m moves quick — for anyone still in, trail your stop and bank partials into TP2 0.00820 / TP3 0.00800. Manage your own risk.

#RealResults
